title: CRISPResso Analysis Protocol
author: Hanqin Li
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4nxqvfn

steps.title: In linux, use the following command
steps.instruction: In linux, use the following command: CRISPResso --fastq_r1 R1_reads.fastq.gz –fastq_r2 R2_reads.fastq.gz --amplicon_seq amplicon_seqeunce_here -g sgRNA_sequence_here

steps.title: Use CRISPRessoBatch command if having many samples
steps.instruction: Use CRISPRessoBatch command if having many samples

steps.title: For more details, https://github
steps.instruction: For more details, https://github.com/pinellolab/CRISPResso2 CRISPResso2 provides accurate and rapid genome editing sequence analysis.. Nature biotechnology.
